name: AZ Loan Help — Mortgage Broker Scottsdale
description_short: AZ Loan Help is a Scottsdale-based mortgage broker powered by Xpert Home Lending (NMLS #2179191) offering residential mortgages, refinances, and commercial loans with fast funding and personalized rate quotes.
description_long:
AZ Loan Help operates as a mortgage broker in Scottsdale, Arizona, leveraging the infrastructure of Xpert Home Lending, Inc. (NMLS #2179191) to serve borrowers seeking home purchase loans, refinancing options, and commercial financing. The company positions itself as an alternative lender willing to approve loans when traditional banks may decline applicants, with the tagline "When Banks Say NO... We say YES!"

The company's core offerings include residential home purchase loans, refinance products (including cash-out refinances), commercial loans, and personal loans. They provide free pre-approval letters, refinance calculators, rate comparison tools, and property evaluations. Their application process is described as streamlined and 100% online, with a stated funding timeline of approximately 30 days. Aaron Kerscher (NMLS #1012304) is listed as a Loan Specialist on their team.

AZ Loan Help differentiates itself through several claimed advantages: competitive rates, fast funding timelines compared to competitors, a rate comparison tool to help borrowers shop before committing, and willingness to work with borrowers whom banks have rejected. The company emphasizes personalized service, with Aaron Kerscher reportedly taking calls outside business hours and providing detailed explanations of loan options. Customer testimonial from Meera Gosalia highlights patience, accessibility, and thorough file review as strengths.

The company operates within the heavily regulated mortgage lending industry and is backed by a licensed lender (Xpert Home Lending). However, the website lacks detailed information about specific loan products, interest rate ranges, eligibility criteria, or fee structures. Claims about approval for borrowers banks reject warrant verification, and the "30-day funding" promise is conditional on unspecified factors. The personal loans offering is mentioned but not detailed, and it's unclear whether these are actually originated by the company or referred.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast stated funding timeline of approximately 30 days from application to funding
Free pre-approval letters, rate comparison tools, and refinance calculators available online
Licensed lender backed by Xpert Home Lending, Inc. with NMLS #2179191
Loan specialist (Aaron Kerscher, NMLS #1012304) reportedly available outside standard business hours
100% online application process described as streamlined
Cash-out refinance options allowing borrowers to leverage home equity
Personalized rate quotes and property evaluations offered at no stated cost
Willingness to work with borrowers rejected by traditional banks
cons: Website lacks specific interest rate ranges, APRs, or fee schedules for comparison
No detailed eligibility criteria or credit score requirements disclosed
Vague about what 'personal loans' actually are—unclear if originated in-house or referred
Claims about approval for bank-rejected borrowers lack supporting evidence or loan portfolio data
Limited information about loan product types, terms available, or loan amounts
Only one customer testimonial provided; no review aggregation or ratings from third parties visible
best_for: Arizona homebuyers seeking competitive rates and fast processing timelines
Homeowners considering refinances or cash-out refinances to access equity
Borrowers who have been declined by traditional banks and want alternative options
Commercial real estate buyers or business owners seeking commercial financing
diagnosis: AZ Loan Help is best suited for Arizona residents seeking residential mortgages or refinances with a preference for fast online processing and personalized service. Primary caveat: the website provides no rate, fee, or detailed product information, making it impossible to verify the claimed competitiveness of their rates or actual approval odds for bank-rejected borrowers without direct contact.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8767 East Vía de Ventura Suite 120, Scottsdale, AZ 85258
